metadata.opportunity: Aurora MySQL to distributed SQL modernization

turns.text: Let us agree on a four-week POC. Scope: one 12TB subset, streaming ingest, and representative checkout plus catalog query traffic.
Success criteria for us: p95 read under 120 ms, write under 30 ms, and no customer-visible downtime during schema evolution tests.
We will also test failover recovery and establish target RTO under 60 seconds with clear runbooks for your SRE team.
Data migration plan matters. We need low-risk cutover from Aurora with repeatable checkpoints and reconciliation.
Agreed. We will propose a staged migration approach with validation checkpoints, rollback criteria, and side-by-side query verification.
Please include a cost model versus Aurora and show projected savings from reducing replica lag incidents and operational overhead.
Action items: we send POC success matrix, required datasets, and next technical review invite by tomorrow.
